creator: znerd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Dave,

> I'm not sure what you mean.  The latest mm.mysql version is 2.0.11,
> and I sent in a patch file to update the port to that version on
> Mar 4 (ports/34150)

Found it. Tested it, but it doesn't seem to be well-tested. The pkg-plist 
file is empty and the patch fails to apply cleanly:

heinz# make package
===>  Patching for mysql-jdbc-mm-2.0.9
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for mysql-jdbc-mm-2.0.9
2 out of 2 hunks failed--saving rejects to build.xml.rej
>> Patch patch-build.xml failed to apply cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/home/ernst/ports/databases/mysql-jdbc-mm.


Could you please resubmit? This time please send a diff instead of a new shar 
file.


Regards,

Ernst
